name: How Now Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt the chocolate and butter together in a microwave or over medium heat, stirring occasionally until smooth.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs by hand, then add the sugar and vanilla. Beat until well combined and smooth for about 2-3 minutes.
4. Add the melted chocolate mixture and flour to the egg mixture. Stir until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until set.
7. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Yield: 56 brownies
Fat content: 6.2 grams per bar (Source of Fiber)
